ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Any additional enhancements on top of the scope will be added to the backlog, prioritized (with the product owners) and implemented within the allocated 90 hours capacity (to be planned during of sprint-3 that is inclusive of development, testing, UAT and deployment activities over a period of 3 weeks). The type of enhancements assumed in sprint-3 are minor attribute-level or business logic updates, no new data ingestion or major architectural changes are assumed to be in scope.
section_path: Table 1: Scope of work with known enhancement details

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Design

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Work with Sanofi Digital and Sanofi Architects and design end to end solution for the platform.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Work with the Snowflake team in defining the data models as per Snowflake best practices.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Testing Activities

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: ZS will work with the Sanofi Digital and OneCI/LUCI teams to design, plan and conduct testing for each sprint to ensure that the defined requirements are successfully achieved.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Below activities will be conducted as part of testing phase:

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: System Testing will ensure end to end testing of all modules within the application and will be conducted for every module.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Orchestration testing with dry run of end-to-end automated jobs within the application.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Testing with interfacing upstream and downstream applications to ensure no disruption in data exchanges.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Validate functional scenarios and business rules.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Collaborate with Sanofi Digital / OneCI / LUCI users and help them perform UAT to confirm that the application was configured as per user requirements and that data is presented accurately.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Out of scope

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Any new enhancements on OneCI apart from the above mentioned will be assessed separately through a change control process.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: DQ checks development hasn't been scoped in this timeline as we still need a thorough discussion on what DQ checks need to be implemented across different layers.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Integration of any new data sources for OneCI/OneCRM is considered out of scope.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Any changes or testing, including impact assessment of downstream applications to be handled by the respective applications. ZS will provide necessary data and support to carry out such activities by the respective applications.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Any GxP processes or documentation are considered out of scope for the SOW.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Any additional data sources/applications or user managed ad-hoc processes will be assessed for impact to include the changes as part of this SOW and collaborate with Sanofi to follow change control process as necessary.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: OneCI security control and access management tables setup and development for Power BI access control and restriction is out of scope.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Assumptions

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Onboarding & Access:

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: ZS resources will be onboarded to Sanofi network prior to the initiation of the project. Any delay may impact the start of the project.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: ZS resources will be provided Sanofi laptop or VDI within a week of project initiation to gain access to Sanofi environment to avoid any project delays.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: It is assumed that Sanofi Digital will provide Dev, Test, Production environment access, for all required tool stack, to ZS within a week of start of respective phase. Any delay in providing access may impact cost and timelines.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: This project is an enhancement work under the project diamond umbrella any assumptions related to onboarding and access mentioned in the diamond SOW will apply here.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Infrastructure and Vendor Responsibilities:

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sanofi Digital will manage legal and compliance considerations for storing data in cloud environment.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Infrastructure cost related to AWS / IICS /Snowflake will be managed by Sanofi Digital / Sanofi Architecture team.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sanofi architecture team will establish guidance for standards to be followed for coding and implementation and ZS resources will follow those standards.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: In case of urgent enhancements / fixes, Sanofi Digital will escalate to expedite migration of code from Dev to Test to Production.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sanofi Digital / Data Management will manage data contracts with data source providers.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sanofi Digital / Architecture team will be responsible for obtaining any security and compliance approvals for migrating data / code to cloud.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Snowflake team will provide advisory / technical SME support in guiding around Snowflake architecture, design, data models and integration of Snowflake with IICS.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: It is assumed that in case of environment slowness for any tool, Sanofi Digital will escalate with the vendor teams to upgrade the environments or fix environment issues. Any delay due to environment or product related issues may impact the cost and timelines.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: This project is an enhancement work under the project diamond umbrella any assumptions related to infrastructure and vendor responsibilities mentioned in the diamond SOW will apply here.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Project Delivery

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sprint – 3 assumed 90 hours of additional enhancements across 3 weeks, on top of the list of enhancements mentioned under the scope section. Any additional enhancements on top of the scope will be added to the backlog, prioritized (with the product owners) and implemented within the allocated 90 hours capacity, if there are enhancements that exceed the 90 hour capacity and have been prioritized those will need to be treated as a change order.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: The type of enhancements assumed in sprint-3 are minor attribute-level or business logic updates, no new data ingestion or major architectural changes are assumed to be in scope.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Any impact to the timeline due to any upstream or downstream applications/teams will be communicated to the product owners and if it impacts the project plan/delivery that will be treated as a change request outside this SOW and will go through the change management process.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sanofi Digital / Data Management will provide sign-offs on the requirements, design and other testing deliverables in a timely fashion; delays in obtaining sign-offs will directly affect the delivery timelines and cost.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Existing AMS operations teams for DSS and SGDW will be available during Project Diamond implementation to clarify any questions on the processes or data in existing platforms.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: ZS will collaborate with Sanofi to document the process during requirements phase.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: All upstream and downstream applications are assumed to conduct their testing within the published timeline and any delay may impact the cost and overall timeline of the project.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: All downstream changes, including connectivity to Snowflake to be managed by respective system owners and/or vendors who support the operations of the downstream applications.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Tech stack assumed is based on decision by Sanofi architects and as described in scope section. Any changes to the tech stack may impact the cost and timelines.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: ZS will be responsible for ensuring copies of all final deliverables and work products are transferred and stored on the Sanofi-designated internal shared folder unless other direction has been provided by Sanofi.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Any event that occurs during the project, which will require alteration of the project plan or induces a risk to quality and schedule of the project, will be deemed as a change. Activities that need design, code or testing changes that are not included as part of current scope, will be considered as enhancements. If the requested changes/enhancements are beyond the original scope of the project, and/or exceed the overall timeline of the project, a separate change request will be raised with additional cost to extend the project scope/timeline.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sanofi Project Diamond Team with guidance from digital data architecture team/tech team who will be responsible for setup / migration of environments from Dev to Test to Production.  ZS will coordinate with Sanofi digital data team on scheduling or performing the deployment activities per Sanofi guidance or formal processes.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: This project is an enhancement work under the project diamond umbrella any assumptions related to delivery, technology stack, architecture, infrastructure/platform mentioned in the diamond SOW will apply here.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Below is the list of key deliverables planned as part of this phase. ZS will work with Sanofi Validation Experts (VEX) to define the PUMA deliverables required as part of this project.

Project Status Tracker

Test Report

Production deployment document

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Timelines

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: The following table shows implementation timelines. The overall timeline is from 22nd July, 2024 through 27th Sep, 2024

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Roles & Responsibilities

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: ZS understands that the success of this project is driven by right mix of people with technology and domain expertise.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Following is a description of high-level roles and responsibilities of key ZS and Sanofi Resources:

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text:
Columns: Role & Team, Responsibilities
Row 1: Onshore ZS Team, Onshore ZS Team
Row 2: Senior Business Analyst/Integration Lead, Has good domain knowledge around Sanofi data and business applications.
Engage and communicate with Sanofi stakeholders as required during product requirements definition, design, and development.
Coordination with onshore team on data findings and data analysis results
Row 3: Offshore ZS Team, Offshore ZS Team
Row 4: Technical Team Lead, Responsible for day-to-day management of project
Responsible to maintaining timelines and quality of all deliverables.
Provide oversight of technical solution design and implementation
Ensure adherence to Sanofi program management framework and standards in delivery.
Row 5: Sr. Developer, Review requirements and design and raise clarifying questions before starting build.
Review design and develop POCs along with the design team.
Review and contribute to the design with the overall solution in mind.
Lead and perform code reviews, with the understanding of overall solution and client coding standards.
Lead with the Design/build activities.
Manage day to day build activities and coordinate with offshore delivery lead to ensure progress is being made as per plan.
Row 6: Test Analyst, Prepare test cases based on scenarios defined
For an issues / concerns around design, requirement and scenarios – raise the same in defect tracker and discuss the same on daily calls 
Create test status report tool and share daily status report using the tool
During UAT phase, retest UAT defects in SIT before they are delivered to UAT for retest

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Sanofi roles & responsibilities

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Following is a description of roles and responsibilities from Sanofi’s side which would be working in close co-ordination with ZS.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text:
Columns: Role & Team, Responsibilities
Row 1: Program Manager, Act at the liaison between ZS and Sanofi leadership
Row 2: PMO, Work in tandem with ZS Project/Testing Coordinator to collaborate with various Sanofi core team/downstream/Infrastructure teams
Provide status updates to Sanofi core team
Row 3: System Owner, Overall business requirement/demand owner
Help with DSS / SGDW retirement plan from a Sanofi standpoint
Row 4: User Project Leader (UPL), Define & Approve user requirements
Provide user requirements for processes where documentation is not available
Provide inputs to come up with effective system retirement and data migration plan
Row 5: Technical Architect, Review & Approve design documents and architecture
Row 6: IS Project Leader (IPL), Review & Approve design documents and architecture
Approve code migration and deployments
Review & Approve test strategy/test cases/test results
Row 7: Validation Expert (VEX), Help define validation plan and PUMA deliverables for the project
Provide inputs to define test strategy, retirement plan and data migration plan
Row 8: Business Quality Representative, Provide business inputs to formulate test strategy

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Risk Management

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Detailed RAID (Risk, Action, Issue, Decision) log process establishment during the project planning and initiation phase will help in early identification of risks and issues and thus taking timely actions and decisions accordingly.

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text: Following are some key risks and their mitigation approach:

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx
ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.text:
Columns: Area, Risks, Mitigation Approach
Row 1: Requirements, Managing unknown
requirements / processes, ZS will closely coordinate with OneCI team to help in proactively pre-empting any issues related to missed requirements and any unknown requirements uncovered after requirements phase and that impacts project timelines will be assessed through Change Control
Row 2: Change Requests, Changes to scope or delivery schedule, delay project delivery and increase project management costs., Assign a single point of contact from Sanofi Digital as the product owner who is accountable for overall project plan and liaisons with other Sanofi functions.
Weekly status updates meetings with the core team to highlight potential issues early to minimize impact on timeline. Periodic Steering Committee meetings to highlight / escalate issues.
Any changes to scope will be assessed through Change Control
Row 3: Delivery, Unavailability of downstream teams for testing, Both ZS and downstream teams to get aligned on the timeline and agree on the complete set of integration test scenarios during requirements phase, any deviations from the agreed upon timeline to be managed through Change Control
Row 4: OneCI/LUCI team’s availability, Timely onboarding of managed services partner and their availability, Sanofi Digital to plan production operations team in a time bound manner

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx

ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhance.source_file: ZS SOW - Project Diamond - OneCI enhancements.docx

Sanofi acknowledges and agrees that ZS is permitted to adjust the timelines, fees and/or personnel assignments set forth in this SOW if, in its reasonable judgement, ZS determines that a Covid-19 Event will prevent it from delivering the project as set forth in this SOW. ZSA_Sanofi_SOW_CR.docx.text: Exit Clause:

With respect to the Services outlines in this SOW only, Sanofi may terminate this SOW, in whole or in part, for convenience to terminating immediately, providing 10 days’ notice. In the event this SOW is terminated for any reason, ZS shall cease the performance of the Services on the date of such termination, and Sanofi shall be responsible only for the payment of fees for Services performed by ZS up to the termination date.
Project Extension

Customer Project Contact is Susan Wisnieski. Vendor Project Contact is Gagan Bhatara. The IPA, PO #E003720017 is amended to extend the contract end date. Consequently, the new end date of PO #E003720017 is December 31, 2024
Additional Services
Scope
The following scope items will be performed between January 02, 2024, to December 31, 2024:
Development of US Commercial data for Tzield till Foundation with no feedback to CIM

Will closely coordinating with the ZS Dupixent Analytics team to provide guidance on standards for the Snowflake and Diamond build. This collaboration includes conducting an assessment and performing minor implementation work on the Diamond foundation side.
Diamond team is responsible for offering subject matter expertise (SME) support to the ZS Analytics team for the Databricks migration.
Diamond team is to provide offshore PMO support for the Dupixent release.
Fitment of One Product and VDS 3.0 in GenMed release along with Change management for One Product and VDS 3.0
Diamond team responsibility to undertake One Product Foundation implementation.
Retrofit of One Product & One CRM for Dupixet/Kevzara and RBD is to be carried out as part of the Oncology release
Scope Activities and Deliverables

For the avoidance of doubt, Provider has provided the Delivery Milestones listed below through the End Date December 31, 2024, and has invoiced Client according to the corresponding Invoice Date. For all other Delivery Milestones listed below beginning on or after January 1, 2024, Provider will work with Client team to execute the described scope activities and deliverables below:

Major defects: Major defects are those which substantially prevent the deliverable from functioning or performing in accordance with the acceptance criteria set forth herein for such deliverable.  Major defects materially impact Client’s ability to use the deliverable and/or cause issues with the trust and reliability of the deliverable and its output.

Critical defects: Critical defects are the most serious type of defects. Critical defects render the deliverable unusable in accordance with the acceptance criteria set forth herein for such deliverable and/or could cause harm to Client. Critical defects would put Client at serious risk of liability issues, lawsuits and compliance issues.
The start and end dates specified above might change as per ongoing discussions between ZS and Sanofi and they will be formalized through a change order.

ZS will provide hypercare support for 2 weeks and shadow two full data refreshes as per source data frequency after the Go Live of every release or until all Critical or Major defects reported within this hypercare window have been resolved. The above schedule of the delivery milestones is for the complete duration of Change Order, which may have to be revisited based on the actual scenarios and any dependencies. In such a scenario both the parties will agree on the revised plan through change control process.  In case any delay occurs due to reasons not related to ZS and impacts the deliverable milestone, the milestone payment schedule will be managed through change control process with alignment from Sanofi and ZS leadership.

Diamond Analytics Roadmap
Out of Scope: The out-of-scope section includes everything from the original Diamond IPA in addition to the following:
Coordination with IC / FD / Reporting team for data bricks migration is out of scope
VDS 2.0 not considered as part of Tzield Foundation as VDS 3.0 will be built as part of Oncology/Genmeds release.
ZS PMO Support outside Dupixent release

Any new Sanofi initiatives that start after Project Diamond Analytics kicks off and impacts the Project Diamond Analytics components or foundation components timeline will be assessed separately through a change control.

Any upcoming projects / changes / new source ingestion / new product launch in the CIM / Diamond environment after initiation of this project are considered out of scope and will be estimated separately
New source ingestion or product launch not in current CIM/Diamond environment are considered out of scope and will be estimated separately

Reporting Dashboards are out of scope: Development and transformation of reports that are currently based on CIM, report business logic, reporting data models, reporting dashboards or dashboard mock-ups are considered out of scope.
Technical Decommissioning of existing CIM / servers is to be managed by Sanofi Digital and considered out of scope of the SOW
Change management and Integration to Diamond Analytics due to changes introduced by other initiatives such as Power BI, OneCRM, Product MDM are out of scope of the SOW.
Any Custom web interface/UI setup for Data Quality Framework, Business rule engine, Data ingestion is considered out of scope.

User account creation, provisioning of the technology stack provisioning, and any relevant activities for Diamond Plus - Analytics are assumed to managed by Sanofi Digital and is considered out of scope

Assessment or evaluation of tools and products to support Diamond Plus – Analytics architecture, design, build and installation of infrastructure components is considered out of scope. Readiness and design of Diamond Plus – Analytics architecture and infrastructure will be owned and managed by Sanofi
Current CIM platform is non-GxP, hence any GxP processes or documentation are considered out of scope
Assumptions The Assumption section includes everything from the original Diamond SoW in addition to the following:
Implementation / migration of Dupixent processes from Databricks to Snowflake to be done by Analytics teams.
Diamond team to provide SME support during assessment phase to Analytics team on Databricks migration
Minor implementation work to be one by Diamond team in Diamond Foundation based upon data bricks assessment outcome in Dupixent release.
Diamond team to review the start time for the GenMed release to avoid any heavy parallelism.
Tzield Analytics processing to be done as part of GenMed release.
VDS 3.0 to be implemented for Tzield foundation
The chosen IDE product (One AI or otherwise) will be responsible for best practices / providing advisory / technical support for components and architecture
Changes to Sanofi defined technology stack will be reviewed with Sanofi and ZS leadership to evaluate impact on the project.

Changes to the project plan after finalization during the Planning phase will be reviewed with Sanofi and ZS leadership to evaluate impact on the project timelines, effort, and cost. ZS will provide the high-level estimate (effort, cost and time) in agreed upon number of days to Sanofi.
Existing operations teams for CIM will be available during Project’s implementation to clarify any questions on the processes or data in existing platforms.

It is assumed that current DSS / SGDW / CIM business rules and data layouts are readily available to facilitate an efficient requirement gathering phase. For processes where there is no documentation available, ZS will collaborate with Sanofi to document the process during requirements phase.

Given that Diamond Omni Channel migration will be a parallel program, ZS Diamond team will work collaboratively with the Omni team and ensure Diamond is integrated with the new Omni Channel platform as per the finalized Sanofi architecture and strategy. Also, Diamond team will keep its project plan aligned with the Omni Channel project plan to ensure seamless integrations.

ZS Diamond will support integration and testing with scope-defined dependent systems while Diamond team will be responsible for testing the Diamond side of the integration, each of those dependent system teams will be responsible for performing testing and any integration required within their system. Diamond will provide these systems with integration specifications and support E2E testing with data exchanges & corresponding validation. Also, if testing support is required beyond Diamond Analytics hyper care period, it will be evaluated / estimated separately depending on the nature of the required support.

This engagement is based on a fixed effort and fixed price for the given scope and duration of the engagement. Any extension to scope or timeline beyond timeline stated in this Change Order, which is December 31, 2024, will be reviewed by Sanofi and ZS leadership to evaluate the impact and may require a change order to accommodate the additional timeline and effort.
It is assumed that PMO activities are owned and managed by Sanofi Digital team.

For environment performance issues of any tool, system, or product required by Diamond Plus – Analytics engagement, Sanofi Digital will escalate with the product or vendor teams to address the issue. Any delay due to environment or product related issues may impact the planned release timelines of the project.
Sanofi Architecture team will establish best practices and coding standards to be followed for implementation which will be followed by ZS team.

Sanofi Digital and/or Architecture team will provide signoffs on the design, development, and testing deliverables in a timely fashion; delays in obtaining signoffs may affect the delivery timelines and effort.

Design and build will be limited to requirements defined during each TA release. If new requirements or business rules are defined post finalization or during/post UAT which will impact the overall project timeline and effort, ZS will complete the impact assessment within an agreed upon timeline, and present to Sanofi and ZS leadership teams for decision making.
ZS will support Sanofi BOS users in creation of UAT test scenarios and fully support users in training and UAT, however UAT execution will be conducted by Sanofi BOS users.

To ensure minimal impact to downstream business applications, transition of all downstream applications to be planned as part of requirements & planning phase to ensure that they are ready for cut-over to new platform according to project releases
Project team will work with Sanofi University team to upload the training material for users migrating from CIM to Diamond Plus – Analytics
Downstream changes and testing to be managed by respective system owners and/or vendors who support the operations of the downstream applications.
ZS will work with Sanofi’s managed services partner and handover the Diamond Plus - Analytics processes through knowledge transition and handover activities.

Two weeks of Hyper care support will be provided after each TA release and two full data refreshes as per source data frequency Hyper Care will only be exited if activities listed in the Hypercare Scope section for support team have been completed and there are no critical or major issues

Transition of all downstream applications will be planned and managed by individual application owners to new platform according to project releases or at the final cut-over of Project Diamond Plus - Analytics to ensure minimal impact.
Current scope and budget estimations include activities defined under scope section.
As part of change management ZS will support & train users to configure user managed program on the Sanofi identified low code no code tool
Post completion of the Hypercare period for a specific release, any changes or enhancements will be managed through change control process.

ZSA_Sanofi_SOW_CR.docx.text: Budget

The price and invoicing schedule for this Change Order is defined in the Scope Activities and Deliverables section. Fees to be invoiced on a Fixed Price basis, as per the above table that represents the invoice schedule that are tied to the delivery milestone. ZS will invoice Sanofi in accordance with the Invoice Dates set forth in Section 2.

The total Project fees authorized under this CO shall not exceed the amount of USD $3,992,895 4,787,895 ($2,400,000 Diamond Analytics (to be invoiced) + $846,497 Remaining Diamond Phase 1 (to be invoiced) + $746,398 (invoiced for the completed Diamond Phase 1 releases) +$795,000 Diamond Analytics Replanning Estimates (to be invoiced) without the prior written consent of Sanofi and supported by a mutually executed change request. All amounts quoted in this IPA are exclusive of any taxes, expenses, etc. All amounts mentioned in this IPA are exclusive of taxes and the same shall be invoiced at actuals as and when applicable.
Service Level Agreement – Timeliness

The schedule variation % of time measures for this penalty shall be determined on the ratio of the difference between the actual start and end date to the difference between the planned start date and end date. The Schedule Variation % will be calculated basis of the delayed delivery milestone. ZS shall complete the milestones within a schedule variation of 100% of the estimated schedule (unless Sanofi and ZS mutually agree on any deviations from the schedule). In the event the schedule variation exceeds 100%, ZS shall be liable to pay service credit. The service credit shall apply 1% each week of the delayed delivery milestone. In no event shall the total amount of service level credits shall exceed, 12% of the delivery milestone (the “Total Service Credit Cap”). The service credit shall only be applicable if the delay in the timeline is solely due to the fault of ZS, and such credit shall be the sole and exclusive remedy to Sanofi. The applicability of service credit will be discussed regularly in the operational committee between Sanofi and ZS.
Accommodating Sanofi Internalization:

If during the program Sanofi internalizes resources (Data engineers, Data Analyst, etc.), the Parties will renegotiate workload, RACI & Cost impact in good faith. The change will be applied on release level and Sanofi will provide 10 business days’ notice to ZS for resource roll-off.  All such changes will be documented in a separate change order.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Change Order effective as of the Effective Date set forth above.
